import io
import string
import list

fn is_space(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(c)
          if is_space(c)
            i = i + 1
          else
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning
        if i >= n
          scanning = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(c)
            if is_space(c)
              scanning = false
            else
              i = i + 1
            end
          when None
            scanning = false
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        i = i
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len()
  mut found: Option<Int> = None
  mut done = false
  while not done and lo < hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match xs.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == t
        found = Some(mid)
        done = true
      else if v < t
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  found
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line2)
      let xs = parse_ints(line1)
      let t_str = string.trim(line2)
      match string.parse_int(t_str)
      when Some(t)
        match bsearch(xs, t)
        when Some(idx)
          println("index=#{idx}")
        when None
          println("not_found")
        end
      when None
        println("not_found")
      end
    when None
      println("not_found")
    end
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end
